channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.title: ☕ AppleOnFire/JennyMod-All-Versions (318 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AppleOnFire

📝 Repository: AppleOnFire/JennyMod-All-Versions

📄 Descrizione: jenny mod minecraft pe mc video download pc java curseforge forge fabric girlfriend addon pocket edition download .jar mediafire link realistic animations render pass bed interaction companion skin texture bedrock edition mcpack free portable zip apk mobile character custom dialogue chat adult content

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-21T06:03:37Z

]]>

item.title: ☕ fish2018/webhtv (145 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: fish2018

📝 Repository: fish2018/webhtv

📄 Descrizione: WebHomeTV 基于FongMi二次开发，增强了 WebHome 自定义首页、App Native SDK、网盘链接检测 和 Nostr推荐首页。 这个项目的核心目标是让 CSP 站点首页可以变成一个真正可开发的网页应用：开发者可以用 HTML/CSS/JavaScript 定制首页，再通过 App 暴露的 Native 能力完成搜索、播放、跨域请求、资源代理、最近观看、网盘检测和状态同步。

⭐ Stelle: 145

🍴 Forks: 41

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-22T07:10:04Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-28T05:59:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: bigchuidw3

📝 Repository: bigchuidw3/spring-ai-agentx

📄 Descrizione: 基于原生 Spring AI 的智能体（Agent）开发框架，提供 ReAct 执行引擎、分层记忆、工具调度、Human-in-the-Loop 等核心能力，形成完整的 Harness Engineering 方案，帮助开发者快速构建 AI Agent，可以快速搭建 Java 版的 Claude Code。

item.description:
👤 Owner: lywnl

📝 Repository: lywnl/ai-app-generation

📄 Descrizione: 基于Spring Boot 3 + LangChain4j的AI零代码应用生成平台。通过用户输入自然语言，由AI Agent 自动执行多源上下文增强、代码生成、项目构建的完整工作流，可一键部署为可访问的Web应用。并结合多级缓存、异步处理、安全护轨等多种优化策略，保证系统的高性能与稳定性

👤 Owner: icysymmetra

item.title: ☕ UmashankarGouda/AuditTrail (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: UmashankarGouda

📝 Repository: UmashankarGouda/AuditTrail

📄 Descrizione: AuditTrail - A comprehensive full-stack application for deployment tracking, audit management, and change visualization. Features Spring Boot 3 backend, React 18 frontend, PostgreSQL database, and Docker containerization. Batch process 40K+ metadata records with real-time dashboard analytics.

item.title: ☕ Sam-Richard-007/Smart-GenAI-Powered-JMeter (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Sam-Richard-007

📝 Repository: Sam-Richard-007/Smart-GenAI-Powered-JMeter

📄 Descrizione: AI-assisted correlation and test-plan editing live, inside JMeter. Load any JMX, run the test, and let the plugin's Smart Correlation Listener capture every response. Then talk to AI in natural language to add extractors, JSR223 scripts, assertions, timers applied directly to your JMeter tree with a confirmation dialog before anything is change

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: jmeter jmeter-plugin jmeter-scripting

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-20T16:32:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T04:14:45Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
